# International Energy Agency

The IEA is the world's premier energy policy advisor, publishing the annual World Energy Outlook ([[iea-world-energy-outlook-2024]]). Tracks global [[photovoltaic-cell]] and [[wind-energy]] deployment. Coordinates with [[ipcc-ar6-report]] climate targets.
